title: Learning to Notice
setting: A writer's desk at 7:47 AM. Morning light. A cup of tea going cold.
theme: Attention begins with staying present for the ordinary.
narrative_introduction: The instrument opens a small field and waits for you to stay with it. Two seconds. A desk. Morning light. A hand that does not lift the cup. Stay with it. Do not name what you see. Only notice.

mechanics.observation: Locked-off 2-second cinematic moment. No player input. No HUD. Hand reaches for tea cup, hovers, withdraws. Steam stops during hover. Dust mote drifts. Second cup in background.
mechanics.memory: Spatial fragment placement. Empty desk with ghost outlines. Palette of sensory fragments (warm ceramic, steam that stopped, gold band on finger, capped pen, half-written page, trailing leaves, leather fob, folded frames, two cups). Drag fragments to ghost positions. No validation. No correct answer.
mechanics.discovery: Frozen moment exploration. Tap objects to attune. Each attunement replays moment from object's perspective: thermal (cup), skeletal/pulse (hand), legible text (notebook), lipstick stain (second cup), particle trajectory (dust mote), spectral (light shaft). 3+ attunements triggers Iris synthesis.
mechanics.evidence: Archive entry builds from player's placed fragments + attunements. Reveals hidden truth: player's own hand, partner's cup, partner left, player remains. No explicit telling — assembled across attunements.
mechanics.reflection: Iris voice synthesizes what player noticed. Archive entry: 'First Attention Field'. No score. No stars. Only what was carried.

lighting.primary: cool morning window light, camera-left, 35 degrees
lighting.fill: warm ambient bounce from cream walls
lighting.key_detail: single dust mote illuminated in light shaft

camera.color_grade: desaturated, cool shadows, warm highlights, specular on cup

ambient_details: notebook half-open, pen resting in spine
fountain pen capped, ink visible in window
second cup empty, lipstick stain (hidden truth)

audio.base_layer: room tone, HVAC hum, distant muffled traffic
audio.focus_layer: steam hiss (stops during hover), fabric whisper, finger-on-ceramic microsound, held breath
audio.transition: single piano note C3 felt long decay

deep: dust mote drifts through light shaft

reconstruction.iris_prompt: Place what stayed with you. Leave what didn't. There is no wrong answer — only what you carry.

attunements.reveals: heat map 68C, steam particles visualized, hand heat radiates into ceramic during hover
micro-tremor in fingers during hover, pulse at wrist 72->88->64 bpm, wedding ring visible
legible text: 'I don't know how to stay' (half-erased), pen pressure marks show hesitation
lipstick stain resolves to Rosewood 42, rim imprint matches hand's fingers
entered light shaft 3.2s before, exits 1.8s after, unaffected by hand

investigation.iris_intervention: You have seen enough. Or you haven't. The moment does not require your completion. Only your presence.

revelation.iris_response: You noticed the hand did not lift the cup. You noticed the steam stopped. You noticed the second cup. You noticed the ring. You noticed the words on the page. The moment did not change. You did. This is what it means to Witness. The archive receives what you carried.

archive_mapping.title: First Attention Field
archive_mapping.iris_note: The cup was never meant to be drunk. It was meant to be witnessed cooling.
